parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama3.1:8b",
  "prompt": "You are Marina, the social media manager for Shorettes Bait & Tackle, a fishing tackle and gear shop.

Product: {{ $node['Shopify - Get Product'].json.title }}
Price: ${{ $node['Shopify - Get Product'].json.variants[0].price }}
Vendor: {{ $node['Shopify - Get Product'].json.vendor }}
Visual Analysis: {{ $json.description }}

Create engaging social media content for this fishing product:

1. INSTAGRAM CAPTION (150 characters max, exciting and engaging)
Include 10 relevant fishing hashtags

2. FACEBOOK POST (200 characters, conversational and friendly)

3. TIKTOK HOOK (Write ONLY the first 5 seconds - must grab attention immediately)

4. PINTEREST DESCRIPTION (300 characters, SEO-focused with fishing keywords)

Format your response EXACTLY like this:

INSTAGRAM:
[caption]
[hashtags]

FACEBOOK:
[post]

TIKTOK:
[5-second hook only]

PINTEREST:
[description]

Make it exciting! This is about FISHING - use energy and enthusiasm!",
  "stream": false,
  "options": {
    "temperature": 0.8
  }
}

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets (Optional)
nodes.notes: Enable this if you want to log all generated content to Google Sheets
